proposedMedication.name: tramadol
proposedMedication.sig: take 1 tablet every 8 hours as needed for breakthrough pain

noteText: Patient presents with acute dental pain and has dental follow-up tomorrow. Reviewed non-opioid options and current ibuprofen use. PDMP reviewed with no concerning recent controlled-substance fills. Short course tramadol prescribed for breakthrough pain only. Discussed sedation precautions, avoidance of alcohol, and need for reassessment if symptoms worsen.
